title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: EUGENE FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities, including an aquatic center, gym, group exercise classes, preschool, afterschool childcare, family fun events, and youth and adult sports. Also provides teen youth clubs and drop-in events. The Virtual Y Hub provides on-demand videos for fitness, yoga, meditation, and more that people can watch at home. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Unrestricted, some programs require YMCA membership Hours: Varies by site Email (541) 686-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 686-9622 Main phone Contact Name: Kari Porter (541) 686-9622 Ext: 1200 Reception Front Welcome Center Desk Main phone (541) 686-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, financial assistance available DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-7pm Services: Children's Play Groups General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools School Readiness Programs Swimming Facilities Wellness Programs Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - LIVESTRONG AT THE YMCA HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - U CAN GYM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE FAMILY YMCA
